question: US Gas Price hits $4(NO) or $5(YES) Next?
textDescription:
https://gasprices.aaa.com/

Resolves based on aaa gas prices. 

Resolves no if gas is at 4.000 or lower next, or resolves yes if hits 5.000 or higher next.

Update 2026-05-08 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): If the price remains between $4 and $5, the market will stay open indefinitely until one of the thresholds is hit. It will not resolve N/A.
newsShortReason: National average gas price is $4.459, trending upward due to high crude oil prices.
newsKeyEvidence: National average gas price is $4.459 as of May 27, 2026. | Memorial Day weekend gas prices reached four-year highs at $4.56. | Crude oil prices are hovering around $100 per barrel, contributing to elevated pump prices.
